stages.concept:
# Unit 077: 동명사의 의미상의 주어 / 동명사의 부정형 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **동명사의 의미상의 주어**와 **동명사의 부정형**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **동명사의 의미상의 주어**는 소유격이나 목적격으로 나타내요.

> I don't mind **his/him** coming late.
> 나는 그가 늦게 오는 것을 신경 쓰지 않는다.

> Do you mind **my/me** sitting here?
> 제가 여기 앉아도 될까요?

> She was proud of **her son's** winning the prize.
> 그녀는 아들이 상을 탄 것을 자랑스러워했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 격식체에서는 **소유격**, 비격식체에서는 **목적격**을 써요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **동명사의 부정형**은 **not + -ing** 형태예요. (to부정사 부정형 not to와 비교!)

> He insisted on **not going** out.
> 그는 외출하지 않겠다고 고집했다.

> She apologized for **not coming** on time.
> 그녀는 제시간에 오지 못한 것에 대해 사과했다.

> I'm sorry for **not calling** you earlier.
> 더 일찍 전화하지 못해서 미안해요.

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"She apologized for (          ) on time." (그녀는 제시간에 오지 못한 것에 대해 사과했다.)
1. not coming ✅
2. coming not
3. to not come

🧑‍🎓 학생: 전치사(for) 뒤에는 동명사가 와야 하고, 동명사의 부정형은 바로 앞에 not을 붙이는 'not -ing' 형태니까 1번이 맞아요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: 완벽해요! 의미상의 주어는 소유격/목적격, 동명사 부정형은 not -ing! 잘 기억하세요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 077: 동명사의 의미상의 주어 동명사의 부정형 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Do you mind (     ) opening the window?
> **정답** him

---

**02.** I am proud of ? winning the prize.
> **정답** her

---

**03.** She insisted on ? not being late.
> **정답** his

---

**04.** I am sorry for ? breaking the cup.
> **정답** my

---

**05.** He is proud of ? passing the test.
> **정답** his

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I apologize for he being rude.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** he → his

---

**07.** She insists on not go out alone.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** go → going

---

**08.** Do you mind I sitting here?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** I → my (me)

---

**09.** He is proud of she cooking well.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** she → her

---

**10.** I remember not go to school that day.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** go → going

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그가 창문을 열어도 괜찮으시겠어요?
Do you mind opening the window?
> **정답** his (him)

---

**12.** 나는 늦지 않은 것에 대해 다행이다.
I am glad about late.
> **정답** not being

---

**13.** 그녀는 그의 성공을 자랑스러워한다.
She is proud of the test.
> **정답** his passing

---

**14.** 그것을 하지 않은 것을 후회한다.
I regret that.
> **정답** not doing

---

**15.** 제가 여기 앉아도 괜찮을까요?
Do you mind sitting here?
> **정답** my (me)

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀가 노래한 것을 자랑스럽게 생각한다.
I am of proud singing her well
> **정답** I / am / proud / of / her / singing / well

---

**17.** 늦지 않은 것이 중요하다.
not being is late important
> **정답** Not / being / late / is / important

---

**18.** 그가 거짓말하지 않은 것에 감사한다.
thankful I am for his not lying
> **정답** I / am / thankful / for / his / not / lying

---

**19.** 제가 질문해도 괜찮을까요?
Do you my mind asking a question
> **정답** Do / you / mind / my / asking / a / question

---

**20.** 거짓말하지 않는 것이 중요하다.
Not is important lying
> **정답** Not / lying / is / important
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 077: 동명사의 의미상의 주어  동명사의 부정형 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오. (2개)
Did you tell Amy about ________________ going on a
trip?
Would you mind ______________ opening the
window?
we - I
us - me
our - my
us - I
> **정답** our - my, us - me

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
A: Do you mind _____________ asking you some
personal questions?
B: No, I don't mind _________________ asking me
any personal questions.
he - he
him - he
his - he
his - him
> **정답** his - him

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I didn't mind his _____________________ to my
party.
So, he didn't have to apologize for
__________________ the party.
no coming - no attending
not coming - not attending
not come - not attend
coming not - attending not
> **정답** not coming - not attending

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
I am sure of ______________ passing the exam.
you
ours
her
their
> **정답** ours

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Mom was proud of she winning the contest.
Do you mind me using your cell phone?
Amy avoided theirs calling her every day.
Tom enjoys his brother's talking to him.
> **정답** Amy avoided theirs calling her every day., Mom was proud of she winning the contest.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
I'm looking forward to he singing on the stage.
Tom is disappointed with us being impolite.
I don't mind she using my computer.
I dislike my sister's making noise in public.
> **정답** I don't mind she using my computer., I'm looking forward to he singing on the stage.

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
우리의 부모님은 항상 우리가 다른 사람을 도와주는 것을 자랑
스러워 하신다.
are helping parents
proud of always
other people. Our us
> **정답** Our / parents / are / always / proud of / us / helping / other people.

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 Amy가 면접에 합격할 것을 확신한다.
am Amy's passing
sure of I the interview.
> **정답** I / am / sure of / Amy's / passing / the interview.

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
선생님은 영어 시간에 학생들이 한국어를 사용하지 않는 것을
좋아하신다.
likes using Korean
the students' The teacher
in English class. not
> **정답** The teacher / likes / the students' / not / using / Korean / in English class.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
I am sorry for didn't coming on time.
She is proud of my making not mistakes on
the test.
Tom suggested me delaying not my
homework.
I still remember his telling me about the news.
> **정답** I still remember his telling me about the news.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
No cleaning my room makes mom angry.
I am fond of their no visiting me without a call.
Amy's motto is don't telling lies to people.
He didn't mind not getting a good grade.
• motto 좌우명
• be fond of ~을 좋아하다
> **정답** He didn't mind not getting a good grade.

---

**12.** 다음 문장을 부정형으로 만들 때, not의 위치를 고르시오.
Amy [1] dislikes [2] them [3] trying [4] hard enough to
achieve their goals.
> **정답** 3

---

**13.** 다음 문장을 부정형으로 만들 때, not의 위치를 고르시오.
My mother is [1] worried [2] about [3] me [4] making
friends at my new school.
> **정답** 4

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom is sick of me never doing my homework.
I don't like them being rude to adults.
Trying not your best will make you regret.
She was tired of his not returning her books.
> **정답** Trying not your best will make you regret.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Not thinking about you every day is
impossible.
He is tired of she not staying quiet in public
places.
I am afraid of our propose not getting any
attention.
Never taking notes in class made them fail the
test.
> **정답** He is tired of she not staying quiet in public places.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Amy told him about hers
quitting the job next week.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** hers → her

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Mom likes her children staying
not home all day long.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** staying not → not staying

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Do you mind I not practicing
soccer after school?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** I → me (my)

---

**19.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
My mom hates I keeping not my
promise.
> **정답** me (my), not keeping

---

**20.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
Amy enjoys no getting out of her bed on
weekends. She stays in the bed all day. Her mom
doesn't mind she doing nothing.
> **정답** not getting (never getting), her, doing
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 077 동명사의 의미상의 주어  동명사의 부정형중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 그녀가 게으른 것을 상관하지 않는다.
힌트 (     ) mind, be lazy
He doesn't  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 mind, her, being, lazy

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
엄마는 나 혼자 여행하는 것을 걱정하셨다.
힌트 (     ) worry about, travel
My mother was  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  alone.
정답 worried, about, my (me), traveling

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 그녀가 그녀의 직장을 잃어서 유감이다.
힌트 (     ) lose one's job
I am sorry for  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 her, losing, her, job

---

**04.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 모두 찾아 다시 쓰시오.
Nick is fond of I talking not to him in English.
→ Nick is fond of
 in English.
정답 me not talking to him (my not talking to him)

---

**05.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 모두 찾아 다시 쓰시오.
The gardener hates the boy watering never the
plants.
→ The gardener hates
.
정답 the boy never watering the plants (the boy never to water the plants)
water the plants)

---

**06.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 모두 찾아 다시 쓰시오.
Do you mind he not apologizing to you?
→ Do you mind  (     )  to you?
정답 his not apologizing (him not apologizing)

---

**07.** 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 동명사를 이용한 문장을
완성하시오.
I don't mind that she plays the piano all day long.
→ I don't  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
all day long.
정답 mind, her, playing, the, piano

---

**08.** 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 동명사를 이용한 문장을
완성하시오.
I was proud that she won first place in the
marathon.
→ I was proud of  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in
the marathon.
정답 her, winning, first, place

---

**09.** 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 동명사를 이용한 문장을
완성하시오.
I dislike that my brother wakes me up on Sunday
morning.
→ I dislike  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
on Sunday morning.
정답 my, brother (brother's), waking, me, up

---

**10.** 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 동명사를 이용한 문장을
완성하시오.
I like that she tried her best.
→ I like  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 her, trying, her, best

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 077: 동명사의 의미상의 주어  동명사의 부정형 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
(2개) Did you tell Tom about ________________ going on a trip?
Would you mind ______________ opening the door? we - I us - me our - my us - I
> 정답: our - my, us - me

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
A: Do you mind _____________ asking you some personal questions?
B: No, I don't mind _________________ asking me any personal questions.
he - he him - he his - he his - him
> 정답: his - him

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I didn't mind his _____________________ to my event.
So, he didn't have to apologize for __________________ the event.
no coming - no attending not coming - not attending not come - not attend coming not - attending not
> 정답: not coming - not attending

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
I am sure of ______________ passing the quiz. you ours her their
> 정답: ours

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Mom was proud of she winning the contest.
Do you mind me using your tablet?
Tom avoided theirs calling him every day.
Amy enjoys her brother's talking to her.
> 정답: Tom avoided theirs calling him every day., Mom was proud of she winning the contest.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I'm looking forward to he singing on the stage.
Amy is disappointed with us being impolite.
I don't mind she using my phone.
I dislike my brother's making noise in public.
> 정답: I don't mind she using my phone., I'm looking

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
우리의 선생님은 항상 우리가 다른 사람을 도와주는 것을 자랑 스러워 하신다. are helping teachers proud of always other people.
Our us
> 정답: Our / teachers / are / always / proud of / us / helping /

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 Tom이 오디션에 합격할 것을 확신한다. am Tom's passing sure of I the audition.
> 정답: I / am / sure of / Tom's / passing / the audition.

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
코치는 체육 시간에 학생들이 핸드폰을 사용하지 않는 것을 좋아하신다. likes using phones the students' The coach in P.E. class. not
> 정답: The coach / likes / the students' / not / using /

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
I am sorry for didn't coming on time.
She is proud of my making not mistakes on the quiz.
Tom suggested me delaying not my project.
I still remember his telling me about the result.
> 정답: I still remember his telling me about the result.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
No cleaning my desk makes mom angry.
I am fond of their no visiting me without a text.
Amy's motto is don't telling lies to people.
He didn't mind not getting a good score.
> 정답: He didn't mind not getting a good score.

---

**12.** 다음 문장을 부정형으로 만들 때, not의 위치를 고르시오.
Amy [1] dislikes [2] them [3] trying [4] hard enough to achieve their goals.
> 정답: 3

---

**13.** 다음 문장을 부정형으로 만들 때, not의 위치를 고르시오.
My teacher is [1] worried [2] about [3] me [4] making friends at my new school.
> 정답: 4

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom is sick of me never doing my project.
I don't like them being rude to elders.
Trying not your best will make you regret.
She was tired of his not returning her pens.
> 정답: Trying not your best will make you regret.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Not thinking about you every day is impossible.
He is tired of she not staying quiet in the library.
I am afraid of our idea not getting any attention.
Never taking notes in class made them fail the quiz.
> 정답: He is tired of she not staying quiet in the library.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Tom  told  him  about  hers quitting  the  club  next  week. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: hers → her

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Dad  likes  his  children  staying not  home  all  day  long. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: staying not → not staying

**18.** 아래 문장에서
